failure_movement.justification: Two specific tasks (3249768e, 8cf51dda) correctly recovered as predicted. But empty cluster was predicted to shrink 2-3 and instead grew +4; wrong predicted flat but shrank -3; correct predicted to improve but fell -6; overall passrate dropped not rose. Most directional claims contradicted.

trace_movement.justification: Token rise correctly predicted (154k→169k, avg prompt +150 tokens, exceeding predicted ~162k ceiling). Empty outputs predicted to shrink but grew from 6 to 10. List-skeleton detail in prompts is unverifiable but consistent with token increase. Mixed: one key claim confirmed, one contradicted.

side_effects.justification: Token rise correctly flagged. Risk of regression flagged but severely underestimated: predicted 1-2 regressions, actual net -6 correct tasks and passrate fell 0.06. Missed empty-cluster growth as a specific risk. Partial credit for direction but wrong magnitude on regression scale.
